case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. BRANDON ROMEO FRANK

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE: #55.00 - SERVED JAN-22-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FRANK, BRANDON ROMEO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-26-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-26-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES LEGAL SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT BRANDON ROMEO FRANK DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF STIPULATED TO JUDGE PROTEM HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANK, BRANDON ROMEO $1,007.90 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,092.90 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
